diagrams.title: Rational Agent Architecture
diagrams.description: Shows the complete structure of a rational agent with sensors, knowledge base, and actuators
diagrams.purpose: Understand how a rational agent perceives, reasons, and acts to maximize performance

diagrams.title: PEAS Framework for Taxi Agent
diagrams.description: Table showing all PEAS components for an automated taxi system
diagrams.purpose: Learn to specify task environments using PEAS framework for any agent application

diagrams.title: Agent Types Hierarchy
diagrams.description: Pyramid showing progression from simple reflex to learning agents
diagrams.purpose: Visualize increasing sophistication and capabilities of different agent types

diagrams.title: Rationality vs Omniscience Comparison
diagrams.description: Venn diagram showing the relationship between rational and omniscient agents
elements: Perfect rationality achievable with limited info
diagrams.purpose: Understand that rationality is achievable while omniscience is not

visuals.title: Concept Of Rationality
visuals.description: Visual diagram for concept of rationality
